summary: Iteration 231 testing completed. All backend APIs and frontend features verified successfully. Key features tested: 1) Backend /api/prompts/today returns missed_yesterday boolean field. 2) Backend /api/auth/me GET/PUT supports first_name field. 3) Frontend feed filters show emojis AFTER text (All 🍯, Now Spinning 🐝, etc). 4) Settings page has First Name * field before Username with required validation. 5) Composer track selector is native <select> element with 'Select a track...' placeholder. 6) Onboarding modal has step 0 for first_name collection (What should we call you? 🐝). 7) Download App card visible in Settings. 8) Navigation shows 'The Vault' instead of 'Collection'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 231 pass. Katie's account now has first_name='Katie' so onboarding first_name step (step 0) will be skipped. The missed_yesterday flag is false for Katie because she answers prompts daily (3 day streak visible). Track selector in ComposerBar is now a native <select> dropdown. Feed filters have emojis AFTER text labels. The Vault label is correct in navigation.
